title: Join my email newsletter | Steve Barclay
meta_description: Are you interested in staying informed about the latest news from Steve Barclay MP? Then sign up for his email newsletter to receive regular updates, news, and insights directly from him. Don't miss out on important information and opportunities to get involved.
headings: h2: Also why not join my WhatsApp announcement group and get news straight to your phone
text_excerpt: Join my email newsletter | Steve Barclay Skip to main content Main navigation Join my Newsletter News Campaigns Our Plan Survey In Parliament Compulsory ID Contact Me Join my email newsletter Tweet Are you interested in staying informed about the latest news from Steve Barclay MP? Then sign up for his email newsletter to receive regular updates, news, and insights directly from him. Don't miss out on important information and opportunities to get involved. Join our mailing list today and be a part of the conversation! Complete this form to join the email newsletter, delivering the latest news from Steve Barclay straight to your inbox. Also why not join my WhatsApp announcement group and get news straight to your phone Stay connected and be the first to know about: Special events and activities Important local, national news and updates Initiatives and campaigns that matter to you National views and policies, including my work on securing borders, opposing wasteful DE&I spending. To join, simply click the link below and become a part of our vibrant community: Join WhatsApp Group News Leverington Sports & Social Club Monday, 28 July, 2025 Back in 2018, I visited Leverington Sports & Social Club and heard about the Club’s ambitious vision to transform part of their field into a 3G pitch. Fast forward to July 2022, and that vision became a reality with the addition of a 3G pitch. Leave this field blank Stay informed on the latest news. Your email First name Last name Postcode Address ID Address 1 Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
